content.full_text:
OKAZAKI & COONTZ
ATTORNEYS AT LAW

JAMES S. OKAZAKI
BRIAN K. OKAZAKI

#2222, CAMINO CAPISTRANO, SUITE A
SAN JUAN CAPISTRANO, CALIFORNIA 92675

FAX
(714) 240-3761

TELEPHONE (714) 831-5222


February 3, 1991


Scott Hallabrin, Esq.
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: Request for Written Opinion

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

As general counsel for the Capistrano Bay District, a
California Community Services District, we are currently faced
with a potential conflict of interest issue. Accordingly, we
respectfully request a written opinion relative to the following
facts:

There are eighteen (18) parcels of land located within
the boundaries of the Capistrano Bay District; all are twelve
(12) feet in width, and are situated between residential lots.
The Capistrano Bay District has record title to the eighteen
parcels, but a number of adjoining owners have claimed and
occupied a number of these lots as their own. One such owner is
a member of the Board of Directors of the District.

QUESTION: May that member participate in any
discussion of the Board of Directors relating to the subject
parcels?

We would appreciate your attention to this matter.

Very truly yours,

OKAZAKI & COONTZ


By_________________________
Brian K. Okazaki

BKO:yo
